title: hesperis robusta
intro: Hesperis robusta, also known as robust or common evening primrose, is a biennial flowering plant that belongs to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hesperis robusta include reducing symptoms of menopause, alleviating eczema and skin conditions, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Hesperis robusta can be consumed as an herbal preparation, such as tea, capsules, or oil, which is extracted from the seeds to support overall health and well-being.
